product.name: Carpentry Companion (AU)
product.tagline: On-site carpentry calculators, learning, and job tracking in one offline app.
product.status: iOS / iPadOS live build path with TestFlight workflow

features.title: Offline-first job workflow
features.summary: Create jobs, notes, presets, materials, and attachments without reception.

features.title: Trade calculators with guardrails
features.summary: Strong input validation, unit handling, and practical rounding controls.

features.title: Guided wizard flows
features.summary: Pick the right method quickly for roofing, stairs, triangles, and estimating.

features.title: Export-ready records
features.summary: Print job reports, calculation slips, and CSV outputs for handover.

wizardFlows.title: Triangle Solver
wizardFlows.summary: Solve missing right-triangle sides and angles from site measurements.

wizardFlows.title: Roof Pitch
wizardFlows.summary: Convert pitch ratio and degrees, then verify rafter length.

wizardFlows.title: Stairs
wizardFlows.summary: Estimate risers and treads and check stair comfort heuristics.

wizardFlows.title: Material Estimating
wizardFlows.summary: Apply waste allowances and estimate sheets or board quantities.

workpacks.title: Roofing
workpacks.summary: Pitch, rafters, set-out, and roofing-specific checks in one workspace.

workpacks.title: Timber Framing
workpacks.summary: Framing geometry, set-out workflows, and timber reference checks.

workpacks.title: Stairs
workpacks.summary: Riser/tread planning, comfort checks, and stair-focused references.

workpacks.title: Estimating & Takeoff
workpacks.summary: Area/volume takeoff, waste allowances, and materials planning.

formulas.title: Area of a Circle
formulas.summary: Find the area of a circle using radius or diameter.

formulas.title: Area of a Rectangle
formulas.summary: Find the area of a rectangle using length and width.

formulas.title: Area of a Triangle
formulas.summary: Find the area of a triangle using base and height.

formulas.title: Board Feet (Metric Equivalent)
formulas.summary: Convert metric dimensions into board feet for mixed-spec timber.

formulas.title: Area to Volume (Thickness)
formulas.summary: Convert area to volume using thickness.

formulas.title: Sheet Count Estimate
formulas.summary: Estimate sheet count from total area and sheet size.

formulas.title: Mitre Angles (Common Cases)
formulas.summary: Quick reference for common mitre cuts with context.

formulas.title: Pythagoras for Rafter Length
formulas.summary: Calculate rafter length from rise and run.

formulas.title: Rafter Length from Run & Pitch
formulas.summary: Calculate rafter length using run and roof pitch in degrees.

formulas.title: Roof Pitch: Rise/Run to Degrees
formulas.summary: Convert rise/run pitch into degrees for set-out.

formulas.title: Roof Pitch: Degrees to Rise/Run
formulas.summary: Convert pitch angle in degrees into a rise/run ratio.

formulas.title: Slope Percent to Degrees
formulas.summary: Convert slope percent into degrees for layout.

formulas.title: Stair Risers and Treads
formulas.summary: Estimate riser and tread counts from total rise/run.

formulas.title: Area Conversion
formulas.summary: Convert between square metres and square millimetres.

formulas.title: Length Conversion (mm/cm/m)
formulas.summary: Convert between millimetres, centimetres, and metres.

formulas.title: Volume Conversion
formulas.summary: Convert between cubic metres and cubic millimetres.

formulas.title: Volume of a Rectangular Prism
formulas.summary: Find volume for a box-shaped space using length, width, and height.

formulas.title: Waste Factor
formulas.summary: Apply a waste percentage to a base quantity.

lessons.title: Reading a Tape Measure (Metric)
lessons.summary: How to read a metric tape quickly and accurately.

lessons.title: Set-out Fundamentals
lessons.summary: Reliable set-out habits that prevent compounding errors.

lessons.title: Right Triangles on Site
lessons.summary: Use Pythagoras for framing checks and set-out.

lessons.title: Roofing Pitch and What the Numbers Mean
lessons.summary: Translate pitch ratios into practical set-out decisions.

lessons.title: Stair Comfort Rules of Thumb
lessons.summary: Heuristics for comfortable stair layouts (not code).

legal.studyDisclaimer: Study tool only, not professional advice. Always verify against the current NCC/Standards and local regulations.
legal.copyrightRule: No Australian Standards or NCC text is republished. References are identifiers, links, and user-authored summaries only.
